templates.title: Agent Run Trace

templates.description: Visualize allow, ask, and deny decisions around guarded commands.

templates.description: Inspect active agent runs, retries, idle sessions, and blocked work.

templates.description: Visualize Portal, runtime adapter, OpenCode server, tools, and workspace topology.

templates.description: Visualize event streaming and snapshot reconciliation paths.

templates.title: Service Topology
templates.description: Map frontend, backend, database, and external service relationships.

templates.title: Planning Plan DAG
templates.description: Render goals, milestones, tasks, and dependencies as an offline DAG.

templates.title: Codebase Galaxy
templates.description: Render directories, modules, files, and imports as a galaxy graph.

templates.description: Show changed files, impacted modules, tests, and release surfaces.

templates.title: Codebase Test Failure Map
templates.description: Connect failing tests to source modules and recent changes.

templates.title: Debug Incident Timeline
templates.description: Render incident events from deploy through root cause and fix.

templates.title: Debug Root Cause Tree
templates.description: Visualize symptoms, causes, evidence, and fixes as a radial tree.

templates.title: Project Issue Graph
templates.description: Map epics, stories, pull requests, and tests.

templates.description: Trace requirements through docs, issues, pull requests, files, and tests.

templates.description: Render claims, sources, and support or refute relationships.

templates.title: Knowledge Document Freshness
templates.description: Plot documents by freshness, reliability, and relevance.
